description: Weak value with low revenue percentage and dependency-neutering simulation risk
domain: Move & Fulfill > Packaging & Returnable Container Management

value_density.rationale: Combined max value <0.1% of revenue; value limited to exception cost avoidance

simulation_viability.rationale: Exception handling depends on real-time data; simplifying would remove core detection logic

anti_patterns: simulation_viability should NOT be 3 — dependencies cannot be isolated without neutering
value_density should NOT be penalized for being low — values are intentionally capped
